hooks.command: if (Test-Path '.claude/context/INDEX.md') { Write-Host ''; Write-Host '=== context-manager: indice de contexto ==='; Get-Content '.claude/context/INDEX.md' | Select-Object -First 25; Write-Host '===========================================' }

Write-Host '-- change-validator [Op4]: pre-commit rapido'; $b = dotnet build --no-incremental -v q 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host '[BLOQUEADO] Build fallido. Ejecuta /validate para el plan de correccion.'; exit 1 }; $t = dotnet test --no-build -v q 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host '[BLOQUEADO] Tests fallando. Ejecuta /validate para ver que fallo.'; exit 1 }; Write-Host '[OK] Build y tests pasaron.'

hooks.prompt: A git commit is about to run in the CalSystem .NET 8 Clean Architecture project. The previous hook already verified build and tests pass. Now run a deeper severity analysis: (1) Run git diff --cached --name-only to see staged .cs files. (2) If entities in Domain/Entities are staged: check src/CalSystem.Infrastructure/Migrations/ for a recent migration covering those changes - IMPORTANT if missing. (3) If new interfaces or repos are staged: check src/CalSystem.Infrastructure/DependencyInjection.cs for registrations - IMPORTANT if unregistered. (4) Read src/CalSystem.Application/CalSystem.Application.csproj and confirm it does not reference CalSystem.Infrastructure - CRITICAL if it does. (5) Check staged .cs files for .Result or .Wait() blocking calls - IMPORTANT if found. Classify findings: CRITICAL blocks the commit, IMPORTANT warns but allows, SUGGESTION is informational. Output a concise severity report. If CRITICAL found, state BLOCKED clearly with details.

hooks.command: try { $ahead = (git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD 2>&1); if ($ahead -and $ahead.Count -gt 0) { Write-Host ('context-manager: ' + $ahead.Count + ' commit(s) sin contexto guardado. Ejecuta /ctx-save para actualizar el indice.') } } catch {}

hooks.rewakeMessage: validate-agent [Op3] detected issues after this turn:
hooks.rewakeSummary: validate-agent found issues — see details above
hooks.command: try { $cs = (git diff --name-only HEAD 2>&1) | Where-Object { $_ -match '\.cs$' }; if ($cs -and $cs.Count -gt 0) { Write-Host ('validate-agent [Op3]: ' + $cs.Count + ' .cs file(s) changed — validating'); $b = dotnet build --no-incremental -v q 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host '[FAIL] Errores de compilacion encontrados:'; $b | Select-String ' error ' | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host ('  ' + $_.Line) }; Write-Host 'Ejecuta /validate para el plan de correccion completo.'; exit 2 }; $t = dotnet test --no-build -v q 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host '[FAIL] Tests fallando — ejecuta /validate para el plan de correccion.'; exit 2 }; Write-Host '[PASS] validate-agent [Op3]: build y tests OK.' } } catch {}
